data.title: FHI Heat launches UNbrush Collection exclusively on TikTok Shop in New Oct 2, 2025. Hair tools brand partners for New Arrivals Surge Campaign.
data.description: A popular professional hair tools and hair care brand, FHI Heat®, has recently collaborated with TikTok for their New Arrivals Surge Campaign. The brand's product, FHI Heat UNbrush®, has been featured in the campaign. This partnership, announced in Los Angeles on October 2, 2025, signifies the brand's dedication to excellence and innovation in the industry. FHI Heat® is well-known for its high-performance design and has joined hands with TikTok to reach a wider audience. This collaboration aims to boost the visibility of the FHI Heat UNbrush® as part of the New Arrivals Surge Campaign, showcasing the brand's commitment to quality.

data.title: Data & Trusted AI Alliance introduces an AI Vendor Assessment Framework for businesses to evaluate AI vendors on risk and value.
data.description: New York-based D&TA Alliance, previously known as D&TA, a nonprofit organization led by CEOs and dedicated to data, trust, and AI, has unveiled its new AI Vendor Assessment Framework (VAF). The VAF consists of a series of questions and advice aimed at aiding companies in assessing generative AI offerings for factors like risk, scalability, and value before acquisition. As businesses increasingly feel the need to guarantee that external AI products can provide a substantial return on investment, the VAF serves as a clear and practical tool for evaluation. This initiative highlights a crucial need for enterprises to carefully vet potential AI vendors to ensure successful outcomes.

data.title: SNCTM establishes Miami as its permanent home with a masquerade event on October 4, 2025, marking a new era in high art and sensuality.
data.description: Miami has been chosen as the permanent home for SNCTM, the world's most exclusive erotic theatre society, marking a new era of high art and sensuality in the city. This announcement was made on Oct. 2, 2025. SNCTM is known for its exclusive and luxurious experiences, with membership fees reaching up to six figures. Miami's selection as a key market solidifies its position as a hub for sophisticated and sensual entertainment.

data.title: Gen Z enthusiastic about Halloween, 93% will celebrate; avg spending $622. 79% of US adults plan to join the festivities.
data.description: A recent survey conducted in Raleigh, NC revealed that a significant majority of American adults, approximately 79%, are gearing up to celebrate Halloween in 2025. This suggests a strong enthusiasm for the spooky holiday across various age groups. Interestingly, many are willing to spend money on festivities, indicating a willingness to invest in the fun and thrill of the occasion.

data.title: Kipu Health sees success with AI in behavioral health, earns ISO/IEC 42001:2023 standard. Oct. 2, 2025.
data.description: A top provider of behavioral health solutions has achieved the ISO/IEC 42001:2023 standard for AI systems. Kipu Health, known for its technology solutions in the behavioral health sector, disclosed on Oct. 2, 2025, a significant advancement in the popularity and effectiveness of its services.

data.title: Mint Incorporation Limited announces voluntary lock-ups by key shareholders, covering all shares, effective until March 31, 2026.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 2, 2025, Mint Incorporation Limited (NASDAQ: MIMI) disclosed that the Company, along with certain shareholders, which include entities under the ownership of Mr. Cheong Shing Ku, Chairman of the Board, and Mr. Hoi Hung Chan, Director and CEO, have agreed to voluntary lock-up arrangements. These agreements pertain to all shares of the Company's capital stock, or securities that can be converted, exchanged, or exercised for any shares of the Company held directly or indirectly by the involved shareholders. The lock-up period started on September 30, 2025, and will conclude on March 31, 2026.

data.title: Frederick County Chamber celebrates 2 members named to 2025 U.S. Chamber CO-100, includes Dynamic Automotive & Rehab 2 Perform.
data.description: In Frederick, Maryland on October 2, 2025, the Frederick County Chamber of Commerce revealed that two esteemed members of the local business community, Dynamic Automotive and Rehab 2 Perform, have been recognized on the 2025 U.S. Chamber of Commerce CO-100 list of America's top businesses.

data.title: Psilera Inc. gets $2M NIH grant for AUD research, to advance neuroplastogen as treatment over 3 years.
data.description: A novel neuroplastogen aimed at treating Alcohol Use Disorder (AUD) is set to progress towards Investigational New Drug (IND) status with the help of a Small Business Innovation Research Grant. The 3-year grant, funded by the National Institute on Alcohol Abuse and Alcoholism (NIAAA), amounts to a maximum of $2 million. The research will take place in TAMPA, Fla., with a focus on reaching specific milestones within the allocated timeframe.

data.title: Laura Markham elected to FEA Board of Directors for 1031 CORP., serving 3-year term. Expert in 1031 exchange industry.
data.description: In Collegeville, Pennsylvania, a renowned tax-deferred exchange services firm, 1031 CORP., revealed that Laura Markham, JD, President of Reverse 1031 CORP. and the General Counsel of 1031 CORP., has been appointed to the Board of Directors of the Federation of Exchange Accommodators (FEA). Markham will serve a three-year term commencing in September. Her election to the FEA Board recognizes her expertise in the 1031 exchange sector and dedication to advancing the industry.

data.title: Wynnchurch Capital buys Charter Industries, a leading provider of edgebanding products serving 4,500 customers.
data.description: A private equity firm, Wynnchurch Capital, L.P., based in Rosemont, Illinois, recently disclosed its acquisition of Charter Industries, LLC, a notable company founded in 1991 and situated in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Charter Industries specializes in providing edgebanding and associated products. It stands out as the sole vertically integrated supplier of edgebanding and related solutions in North America, catering to more than 4,500 customers.

data.title: Pending U.S. home sales down 1% YoY, biggest decline in nearly 5 months. Top cities: Houston (-15.4%), Denver (-12.3%), Las Vegas (-11.2%). Buyers have bargaining power.
data.description: In Seattle, pending U.S. home sales experienced a significant drop of approximately 1% compared to the previous year, marking the largest decline in nearly five months, as per a recent report from Redfin, the real estate brokerage associated with Rocket. Across the nation's top 50 metropolitan areas, pending sales decreased in 30 regions, with the most notable declines seen in Houston (-15.4% year over year), Denver (-12.3%), and Las Vegas (-11.2%). The decrease in home sales can be attributed to a variety of factors, with high home prices being a major deterrent for potential buyers.

data.title: Centersquare invests $1 billion to acquire 10 data centers in US and Canada, expanding portfolio to 80 facilities.
data.description: Centersquare, a prominent provider of advanced colocation facilities in key markets throughout North America and the U.K., shared news today regarding the acquisition of 10 data centers in the United States and Canada. With this acquisition, the company's portfolio has extended to 80 facilities, showing a substantial growth in capacity to accommodate high-density computing workloads. The move signifies a strategic development, highlighting the robustness and expanding reach of their platform.

data.title: USDT and USDC market share drops to 84%, ending stablecoin duopoly dominance.
data.description: Although Tether's USDt and Circle's USDC have been receiving the majority of stablecoin inflows, they are now experiencing a gradual decline in market share. This suggests a shift away from the dominance of these two stablecoins, signaling the potential end of the "stablecoin duopoly." The decrease in market share for Tether's USDt and Circle's USDC highlights a changing landscape in the stablecoin market, indicating a more diversified ecosystem with other stablecoin options gaining traction. This trend reflects a broader adoption of alternative stablecoin options, indicating a potential decrease in the stronghold previously held by Tether and Circle in this market segment.
